nasb.text: But I, like a deaf man, do not hear; And I am like a mute man who does not open his mouth.

esv.text: But I am like a deaf man; I do not hear, like a mute man who does not open his mouth.

cnv.text: 至於我，像個聾子，不能聽見； 像個啞巴，不能開口。

ccb.text: 但我像听不见的聋子， 无法说话的哑巴。

csbs.text: 至于我，我就像耳聋的不能听见， 像哑巴不能开口。
